TABLE.NAME: local_ocr_results
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores OCR text extracted from image file submissions

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle context ID of the file

FIELD.NAME: component
FIELD.COMMENT: Component that owns the file, e.g. assignsubmission_file

FIELD.NAME: filearea
FIELD.COMMENT: File area within the component, e.g. submission_files

FIELD.NAME: itemid
FIELD.COMMENT: Item ID within the file area (submission ID, attempt ID, etc.)

FIELD.NAME: filepath
FIELD.COMMENT: File path within the file area

FIELD.NAME: ocr_text
FIELD.COMMENT: Text extracted by OCR, or the not-found message

FIELD.NAME: model
FIELD.COMMENT: AI model used for OCR, e.g. gemini or openai

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp when the OCR result was created

INDEX.NAME: contextid_component_filearea_itemid
INDEX.COMMENT: Speed up lookups when checking the cache for a specific submission
